programs.title: Channel 4 News
programs.desc: Channel 4's flagship news programme. Including the weather.

programs.title: Jamie's Ultimate BBQ
programs.desc: Fresh air, good vibes, and smoky magic! Jamie Oliver fires us up with top tips to perfect our grill skills. He cooks juicy sirloin three ways and makes luscious lamb lollipops.

programs.title: Virgin Island
programs.desc: It's the Nudity Phase as the virgins get familiar with genital anatomy. And Tegan takes a big step forwards with Risdon, experiencing connection through touch like never before.

programs.title: Gordon Ramsay's Secret Service
programs.desc: Gordon infiltrates struggling restaurants with the help of a secret insider. Sisters in turmoil need an intervention to save their dad's legacy.

programs.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programs.desc: A patient with an ankle injury recalls how meeting her husband saved her life. And 84-year-old Ioannis is treated for dizziness as his kids speak warmly of a brave, loving father.

programs.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programs.desc: Two air ambulance teams scramble to help a critically injured dad and his two young sons after a car collision. Gardener Graham has a nasty open ankle fracture.
